title: FDDI Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 04 Junior Faculty, Lab Assistant Posts
description: The Footwear Design & Development Institute (FDDI) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 04 Junior Faculty and Lab Assistant posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, M.E./M. Tech,10th, 12th, or Diploma can apply for the FDDI Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the educat...
